title: Team SMP++
description: A selection of recommended mods for the Team SMP Minecraft server.
body:
# teamsmp/mods

This is the Team SMP++ modpack, based on [Performium by KasaiSora](https://modrinth.com/modpack/performium-was-taken) as of version 5.0.0. It contains mods that can be used on the Team SMP - JunglTemple himself uses this modpack. Probably because he made it.

## DISCLAIMER

This modpack contains mods that are allowed on the Team SMP, but may be blacklisted on other servers! Use at your own risk.
